title: Accelerated Learning: Training for High Proficiency in a Complex World (Expertise: Research and Applications Series) location 3514
body: The Simplifying Conditions Method (Kim & Reigeluth, 1996; Reigeluth, 1999) provides an approach to the incrementation of complexity that is suited to advanced knowledge acquisition because it incrementally introduces interactions as well as “compartments” of to-be-learned material. In
